case_title: JAMEEL SUBEDAR VS. DEL SEYMOUR et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SUBEDAR, JAMEEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SEYMOUR, DEL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 162 TAYLOR ST. #10, S.F. CA. 94102, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUBEDAR, JAMEEL AS TO DEFENDANT SEYMOUR, DEL DOES 1-5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SEYMOUR, DEL
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT SEYMOUR, DEL
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $23.33 FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUBEDAR, JAMEEL
PROOF OF SERVICE OF SUMMONS, COMPLAINT & PREJDUGMENT CLAIM FILED BY PLAINTIFF SUBEDAR, JAMEEL SERVED FEB-17-2007, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SEYMOUR, DEL
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT SEYMOUR, DEL
